hero.subtitle: Gear for hikers, campers, climbers and runners who call Indonesia their playground — designed in Jakarta, tested on every island.

story.title: Inspired by Experience
story.p1: Since 1999, Consina has been Indonesia's outdoor lifestyle brand — born in Jakarta, built for adventurers.
story.p2: Every product we make is shaped by feedback from our community of hikers, campers, and climbers. We don't just design gear — we design from lived experience.
story.p3: Today, our 'Responsible Trekker' community spans the entire archipelago, sharing one belief: leave the trail better than you found it.

categories.title: Shop by Category
categories.subtitle: Built for every adventure, made in Indonesia
categories.tents_desc: From solo overnighters to group expeditions
categories.apparel_desc: Jackets, pants, and shirts for the trail
categories.footwear_desc: Trekking shoes built for Indonesian terrain

community.title: The Responsible Trekker
community.p1: We believe outdoor adventure and environmental care are inseparable. That's why our community of hikers, climbers, and campers carry one promise: leave the trail better than you found it.
community.p2: Join thousands of Indonesian adventurers who choose gear that respects the mountains they love.

store_locator.title: Find us across the archipelago.
store_locator.subtitle: With more than 150 stores from Aceh to Jayapura, there's a Consina counter near every trailhead. Swing by — our staff are hikers too.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about Consina, our products, and our community.

contact.subtitle: Whether it's product care, dealer enquiries, or a trail story you want to share — our team in Jakarta reads every message.
contact.success: Thanks! We'll reply within 2 business days.
contact.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.submit_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at info@consina.com

footer.blurb: An Indonesian outdoor lifestyle brand since 1999. Built in Jakarta, tested across the archipelago — from Rinjani's ridgelines to the rainforests of Kalimantan.
